controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the master directions on authorisation to operate a payment system
controls.control_description:
1.1 These Directions shall be called the Master Directions on Authorisation to operate
a Payment System.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the master directions on authorisation to operate a payment system

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect on the day they are placed on the website of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
1.2 These directions shall come into effect on the day they are placed on the website
of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect on the day they are placed on the website of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure any arrangement whether in the form of shareholding or agreement or otherwise, which enables exercise of control
controls.control_description:
Definitions
Explanation: The term 'effective control' means any arrangement whether in the form
of shareholding or agreement or otherwise, which enables exercise of control.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any arrangement whether in the form of shareholding or agreement or otherwise, which enables exercise of control

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company registered under section 3 of the companies act, 1956 or the corresponding provision under the companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
(3) 'Company' means a company registered under Section 3 of the Companies Act,
1956 or the corresponding provision under the Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company registered under section 3 of the companies act, 1956 or the corresponding provision under the companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure an arrangement involving two or more entities related to each other through any of the following relationships: subsidiary - parent (defined in terms
controls.control_description:
(4) 'Companies in the group' means an arrangement involving two or more entities
related to each other through any of the following relationships: Subsidiary - parent
(defined in terms of AS 21), Joint venture (defined in terms of AS 27), Associate
(defined in terms of AS 23), Promoter-promotee [as provided in the SEBI (Acquisition
of Shares and Takeover) Regulations, 1997] for listed companies, a related party
(defined in terms of AS 18), common brand name, and investment in equity shares of
20 percent and above.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an arrangement involving two or more entities related to each other through any of the following relationships: subsidiary - parent (defined in terms

controls.control_objective: To ensure , the person who together with his relatives [as defined in section 2(77) of the companies act, 2013 and rules made there under], by virtue of his ownership of voting equity shares, will be/ is in effective control of payment system operator, and includes
controls.control_description:
(5) 'Promoter' means, the person who together with his relatives [as defined in Section
2(77) of the Companies Act, 2013 and Rules made there under], by virtue of his
ownership of voting equity shares, will be/ is in effective control of Payment System
Operator, and includes, wherever applicable, all entities which form part of the
Promoter Group.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , the person who together with his relatives [as defined in section 2(77) of the companies act, 2013 and rules made there under], by virtue of his ownership of voting equity shares, will be/ is in effective control of payment system operator, and includes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to be promoter group merely by virtue of the fact that ten per cent or more of the equity share capital of the promoter is held by such inst
controls.control_description:
Provided that a financial institution, scheduled commercial bank, foreign institutional
investor or mutual fund shall not be deemed to be promoter group merely by virtue of
the fact that ten per cent or more of the equity share capital of the promoter is held by
such institution unless such investment is strategic in nature.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to be promoter group merely by virtue of the fact that ten per cent or more of the equity share capital of the promoter is held by such inst

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available on an on-tap basis to an entity who intends to operate a payment system
controls.control_description:
3.2 Authorisation shall be available on an on-tap basis to an entity who intends to
operate a payment system.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available on an on-tap basis to an entity who intends to operate a payment system

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit an application in the prescribed form through rbi's portal
controls.control_description:
4.1 An entity seeking authorisation to operate a payment system shall submit an
application in the prescribed form through RBI's portal.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit an application in the prescribed form through rbi's portal

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in accordance with the guidelines/ directions issued for the specific payment system
controls.control_description:
4.2 The capital requirement shall be in accordance with the Guidelines/ Directions
issued for the specific payment system.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be in accordance with the guidelines/ directions issued for the specific payment system

controls.control_objective: To ensure also submit a certificate in the enclosed format (annexure) from its statutory auditor, evidencing compliance with the applicable net-worth requiremen
controls.control_description:
4.4 An entity while submitting the application for authorisation, shall also submit a
certificate in the enclosed format (Annexure) from its Statutory Auditor, evidencing
compliance with the applicable net-worth requirement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to also submit a certificate in the enclosed format (annexure) from its statutory auditor, evidencing compliance with the applicable net-worth requiremen

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the certificate, along with a provisional balance sheet of a recent date
controls.control_description:
A newly incorporated entity, not
having an audited balance sheet shall submit the certificate, along with a provisional
balance sheet of a recent date.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the certificate, along with a provisional balance sheet of a recent date

controls.control_objective: To ensure conform to the reserve bank's 'fit and proper' criteria, including but not limited to:
controls.control_description:
4.5 The Entity / Promoters / Promoter Groups, shall conform to the Reserve Bank's 'fit
and proper' criteria, including but not limited to:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conform to the reserve bank's 'fit and proper' criteria, including but not limited to:

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a past record of sound credentials and integrity
controls.control_description: (i) The entity shall have a past record of sound credentials and integrity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a past record of sound credentials and integrity

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a record of financial integrity
controls.control_description:
(ii) Director of a Promoter Company / Group Company shall have a record of
financial integrity;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a record of financial integrity

controls.control_objective: To ensure have incurred any of the following disqualifications - a) convicted by a court for any offence involving moral turpitude or any economic offence or an
controls.control_description:
(iii) Such person shall not have incurred any of the following disqualifications -
a) Convicted by a court for any offence involving moral turpitude or any
economic offence or any offence under the laws administered by the
RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have incurred any of the following disqualifications - a) convicted by a court for any offence involving moral turpitude or any economic offence or an

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final
controls.control_description: RBI's decision on whether a person is a fit and proper person shall be final.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final

controls.control_objective: To ensure be other important criteria
controls.control_description: shall be other important criteria.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be other important criteria

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be returned
controls.control_description:
The application which is not in compliance with regulatory
requirements as per the provisions of extant DPSS directions, may also be returned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be returned

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that new investments from fatf non-compliant jurisdictions are less than both (i) 20 per cent of the existing voting powers, and (ii) 20 pe
controls.control_description:
In such cases, it should be ensured that new investments from FATF non-compliant
jurisdictions are less than both (i) 20 per cent of the existing voting powers, and (ii) 20
per cent of existing and potential voting powers assuming those potential voting rights
have materialised.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that new investments from fatf non-compliant jurisdictions are less than both (i) 20 per cent of the existing voting powers, and (ii) 20 pe

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated at par with that from compliant jurisdictions
controls.control_description:
Investments in PSOs
from FATF non-compliant jurisdictions shall not be treated at par with that from
compliant jurisdictions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated at par with that from compliant jurisdictions

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue with the investments or bring in additional investments as per extant regulations so as to support continuity of business in india
controls.control_description:
5.2 Investors in existing PSOs holding their investments prior to the classification of
the source or intermediate jurisdiction/s as FATF non-compliant, may continue with the
investments or bring in additional investments as per extant regulations so as to
support continuity of business in India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue with the investments or bring in additional investments as per extant regulations so as to support continuity of business in india

controls.control_objective: To ensure account for less than 20 per cent of the voting power (including potential voting power) of the pso
controls.control_description:
In other words, fresh investment (directly or
indirectly) from such jurisdictions, in aggregate, should account for less than 20 per
cent of the voting power (including potential voting power) of the PSO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to account for less than 20 per cent of the voting power (including potential voting power) of the pso

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided when the certificate of authorisation (coa) becomes due for renewal
controls.control_description:
6.2 For an existing authorised Payment System Operator (PSO), perpetual validity may
be provided when the Certificate of Authorisation (CoA) becomes due for renewal,
subject to its adherence to the following:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided when the certificate of authorisation (coa) becomes due for renewal

controls.control_objective: To ensure be withdrawn
controls.control_description:
If a PSO fails to do so in a
reasonable time, its authorisation may be withdrawn.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be withdrawn

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake action as deemed fit under the provisions of pss act, including imposition of restrictions on payment system operations and / or revocation
controls.control_description:
6.4 If an entity becomes non-compliant with any of the conditions of authorisation, RBI
may undertake action as deemed fit under the provisions of PSS Act, including
imposition of restrictions on payment system operations and / or revocation of CoA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake action as deemed fit under the provisions of pss act, including imposition of restrictions on payment system operations and / or revocation

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the reserve bank for voluntary surrender of its coa
controls.control_description:
7.1 A PSO, authorised under PSS Act, intending to discontinue its payment system
operations may apply to the Reserve Bank for voluntary surrender of its CoA.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the reserve bank for voluntary surrender of its coa

controls.control_objective: To ensure inter-alia indicate: a) the process to be adopted for repaying the liabilities to customers / merchants / agents / banks, etc
controls.control_description:
Such public notice, shall inter-alia indicate:
a) The process to be adopted for repaying the liabilities to customers / merchants
/ agents / banks, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inter-alia indicate: a) the process to be adopted for repaying the liabilities to customers / merchants / agents / banks, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure , i
controls.control_description:
7.5 In case entity is not able to extinguish its liabilities, it shall,
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , i

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the status of outstanding amount in escrow account to rbi after the completion of said period of three years
controls.control_description:
The entity shall submit the status of outstanding amount in escrow account to
RBI after the completion of said period of three years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the status of outstanding amount in escrow account to rbi after the completion of said period of three years

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the original coa to dpss, co, rbi, mumbai for cancellation
controls.control_description:
7.7 On receipt of the advice from the Bank about acceptance of the request for
voluntary surrender of CoA, the entity shall submit the original CoA to DPSS, CO, RBI,
Mumbai for cancellation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the original coa to dpss, co, rbi, mumbai for cancellation

controls.control_objective: To ensure impose a cooling period of one year in the following situations: i
controls.control_description:
8.1 RBI may impose a cooling period of one year in the following situations:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to impose a cooling period of one year in the following situations: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allowed to submit an application for operating any payment system under the pss act
controls.control_description:
8.2 During the cooling period the entities shall not be allowed to submit an application
for operating any payment system under the PSS Act.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to be allowed to submit an application for operating any payment system under the pss act

controls.control_objective: To ensure waive or curtail the cooling-off period in cases where it is deemed necessary and expedient in exceptional cases, on representation
controls.control_description:
8.3 RBI may waive or curtail the cooling-off period in cases where it is deemed
necessary and expedient in exceptional cases, on representation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to waive or curtail the cooling-off period in cases where it is deemed necessary and expedient in exceptional cases, on representation

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to the faqs section of dpss and citizen's charter on the rbi website for application guidance
controls.control_description:
9.1 Entities applying to operate a payment system under the PSS Act may refer to the
FAQs section of DPSS and Citizen's Charter on the RBI website for application
guidance.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to refer to the faqs section of dpss and citizen's charter on the rbi website for application guidance

controls.control_objective: To ensure refer to rbi circular (requirement for obtaining prior approval in case of takeover / acquisition of control of non-bank psos and sale / transfer of p
controls.control_description:
9.2 The Authorised Non-Bank PSOs shall refer to RBI circular (Requirement for
obtaining prior approval in case of takeover / acquisition of control of non-bank PSOs
and sale / transfer of payment system activity of non-bank PSO) (as updated from time
to time) for effecting takeover / Acquisition of control, which may / may not result in
change of management or sale/transfer of payment activity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to refer to rbi circular (requirement for obtaining prior approval in case of takeover / acquisition of control of non-bank psos and sale / transfer of p

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as given under these directions
controls.control_description:
All
approvals/acknowledgements given under guidelines/ directions stated above shall be
deemed as given under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as given under these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be guided by the provisions of said instructions/guidelines
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action
taken/ purported to have been taken or initiated under the instructions/ guidelines
having repealed shall continue to be guided by the provisions of said
instructions/guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to continue to be guided by the provisions of said instructions/guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
10.2 Application of other laws not barred:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in
force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
10.3 Interpretations:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in
respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these
Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
